title: TeamSpreader
description:
This mod helps you to make teams in Minecraft way easier.
Just take distributor and choose your team!
body:
# Mod, which helps to make teams easier in Minecraft. Use the distributor, and pick your colour!

Supported languages: RU/ENG

Distributor is given by entering the world. Just right-click it, and the GUI of choosing will be opened.

_Made by w7rd._
